---
title: "Historic Zoning Maps of Greater Boston"
orientation: columns
---

# page 1

## Map {.fill}
```{r}
library(leaflet)

leaflet() |> addTiles() |> 
  setView(lat = 42.3555, lng = -71.0565, zoom = 10)

```

# page 2

::: {.card title="My Title"}
Card text 
:::

## Row {.tabset}

### Plots

```{r}
print('A')
```

{{< lipsum 3 >}}


```{r}
print('C')
```

{{< lipsum 3 >}}


### Data

```{r}
print('C')
```

{{< lipsum 3 >}}
